catalogs.title: UniShorts Brand Identity & Positioning 2026/2027
catalogs.description: Official brand identity and positioning guidelines for UniShorts, an academic platform for student short films. Covers logo systems, typography, color palettes, and digital applications for 2026/2027.
catalogs.summary: UniShorts' 2026/2027 brand identity and positioning guidelines define the visual and strategic framework for this academic platform dedicated to student short films. The document details logo systems, construction, and usage rules, alongside typography, primary and secondary color palettes, and grayscale systems. It ensures consistent application across digital and physical touchpoints, reflecting a cinematic, academic, and modern digital identity.

catalogs.title: Activity Report: Law, Civics, and Citizenship
catalogs.description: Report on a field experience by ENSAD students, focusing on law, civics, and citizenship through educational and creative activities with vulnerable children.
catalogs.summary: This report documents a month-long field experience by ENSAD students (March 30 - April 30, 2026) at an association supporting vulnerable children. Focused on law, civics, and citizenship, the students engaged children in educational and creative activities, integrating digital tools like graphic tablets and computer games. Their role involved pedagogical support, adapting lessons for diverse learning needs, and fostering an interactive environment. The experience aimed to develop children's cognitive and creative skills while enhancing the students' understanding of civic responsibility and practical educational engagement.

catalogs.title: Academia App UX/UI Report: Centralized University Information System
catalogs.description: This UX/UI report presents Academia, a university application designed to centralize academic information for students, faculty, and administration. It details the user-centered design process, addressing the challenge of scattered announcements, schedules, and grades to improve the university experience.
catalogs.summary: This UX/UI report presents Academia, a university application designed to centralize essential academic information for students, faculty, and administration. It details a user-centered design process, including problem definition, personas, user journey mapping, and user testing. The report identifies the dispersion of announcements, schedules, and grades across multiple channels as a key challenge, often stemming from administrative processes. Academia aims to provide a unified, intuitive platform to enhance information access and communication within the university.

catalogs.title: RICO: Comprehensive Digital & Print Solutions
catalogs.description: RICO provides comprehensive, integrated solutions for printing, photography, graphic design, and social media management, empowering businesses in Mohammedia to enhance their digital and physical presence.
catalogs.summary: RICO is a Mohammedia-based enterprise launching in 2026, offering integrated solutions for printing, photography, graphic design, and social media management. Positioned as the first to consolidate these diverse services, RICO targets local small businesses, entrepreneurs, and institutions. The company seeks 1.5 million DH to fund equipment, digital platform development, and marketing, projecting 500,000 DH in first-year revenue and creating 15 jobs. Its strengths include a strategic location, quality offerings, and a dynamic team with complementary expertise.

catalogs.title: Final Year Project Report: Graphic and Digital Media Design
catalogs.description: This final year project report from ENSAD Casablanca details the design and creation of graphic and digital media. It highlights an internship at Humantech Solutions, focusing on the complete UI/UX redesign of the Ingenio Careers recruitment platform, including logo creation and interactive prototyping with Adobe XD. T
catalogs.summary: This final year project report by Oussama LAABIDATE from ENSAD Casablanca (2024/2025) details his Graphic and Digital Design studies and professional immersion. It highlights a nine-week internship at Humantech Solutions, where he led the comprehensive UI/UX redesign of the Ingenio Careers recruitment platform, including logo creation and interactive prototyping with Adobe XD. The report also covers his contributions to ENSAD's artistic and cultural initiatives, such as the Hackathon Gaming and designing the visual identity for the Fedala Grand Écran festival.

catalogs.title: Internship Report: 'Ombres du Passé' Short Film Production
catalogs.description: This internship report documents the collaborative production of 'Ombres du Passé,' a short film by ENSAD UH2C students. It details the pre-production, production, and post-production phases of the film, which explores themes of grief, psychological impact, and the blurred line between reality and imagination.
catalogs.summary: This internship report details the interdisciplinary production of "Ombres du Passé," a short film by ENSAD UH2C students. It documents the collaborative process from pre-production (scenario by Aya NAJI, storyboards by Zineb KAMEL) through production and post-production (poster by Oussama LAABIDATE). The film explores themes of grief, psychological impact, and the blurred line between reality and imagination, focusing on protagonist Ali's struggle with obsessions and nightmares after his friend Fouad's death, and his journey to reconcile with his past.

catalogs.title: Laabidate Oussama Graphic Design Portfolio 2025
catalogs.description: Explore the 2025 graphic design portfolio of Laabidate Oussama, a passionate artist specializing in visual arts and graphic design. This catalog showcases a diverse range of projects including posters, logotypes, photography, magazine layouts, and UX/UI design, highlighting a focus on detail and color harmony.
catalogs.summary: Laabidate Oussama's 2025 graphic design portfolio features a diverse collection of projects, including posters, logotypes, photography, magazine layouts, and UX/UI design. This young, passionate artist emphasizes visual arts, graphic design, attention to detail, and color harmony, aiming to create original and inspiring works.

catalogs.title: Web4Jobs Brand Identity Guidelines
catalogs.description: This official document details the brand identity and positioning for Web4Jobs, an EdTech platform specializing in digital career training. It provides comprehensive guidelines for logo usage, color palette, typography, and application across various digital and print materials, ensuring consistent visual representatio
catalogs.summary: This document details the brand identity and positioning for Web4Jobs, an EdTech platform specializing in digital career training across web, data, cybersecurity, and Web3. It provides comprehensive guidelines for logo usage, color palette, typography, and application across digital and print materials, ensuring consistent visual representation that emphasizes growth, certification, and professional impact.

catalogs.title: Pain de Braise: Photographic Portfolio by Oussama Laabidate (2024-2026)
catalogs.description: Oussama Laabidate's photographic portfolio, 'Pain de Braise,' presents a selection of images from his art and design journey (2024-2026). It explores themes of portraiture, daily life, movement, landscape, and Moroccan visual heritage, aiming for a sensitive, personal, and coherent visual style. The artist's approach b
catalogs.summary: Oussama Laabidate's 'Pain de Braise' is a photographic portfolio (2024-2026) exploring portraiture, daily life, movement, landscape, and Moroccan visual heritage. It seeks a sensitive, personal, and coherent style, blending observation, emotion, and composition to connect documentary elements with artistic sensibility and visual memory.

catalogs.title: Oussama Laabidate: Applied Art & Infographics Portfolio 2023
catalogs.description: Explore the 2023 portfolio of Oussama Laabidate, a passionate artist specializing in applied art and infographics. This collection features works inspired by intricate details and harmonious colors, showcasing his journey in hyperrealism, product design, and unique artistic projects. Oussama aims to inspire and connect
catalogs.summary: Oussama Laabidate's 2023 portfolio highlights his expertise in applied art and infographics, driven by a passion for intricate details and harmonious colors. This collection features works in hyperrealism, product design, and various artistic projects, demonstrating his creative journey and commitment to inspiring others.

catalogs.title: Fragrance 2024 Graphic Charter
catalogs.description: Explore the official Fragrance 2024 graphic charter. This document outlines comprehensive brand guidelines, including logo usage, typography, primary color palettes, and application across various materials like packaging and stationery.
catalogs.summary: This graphic charter defines the Fragrance 2024 brand identity, detailing logo specifications, primary typography, official color palettes, and application guidelines for stationery, packaging, and other graphic elements.

catalogs.title: Design Thinking Project: Brand Identity for 'Copie de l'Espoir' Art & Print Shop
catalogs.description: This Design Thinking project by Oussama Laabidate details the development of a brand identity for 'Librairie Copie de l'Espoir', a business offering art supplies, printing services, and books. The process covers competitor analysis, user empathy, ideation for a company name and logo, and prototyping, all aimed at enhan
catalogs.summary: This Design Thinking project outlines the comprehensive process of developing a brand identity for 'Librairie Copie de l'Espoir', a business combining art supplies, printing, and books. It covers competitor analysis, user empathy, ideation for a company name and logo, and prototyping, with the goal of establishing a distinct graphic charter.

catalogs.title: Budding Artists 2023-2024: Women's Rights Day Exhibition
catalogs.description: This catalog documents the 'Budding Artists 2023-2024' exhibition, presented at Lycée technique de Settat to commemorate Women's Rights Day. It features student artworks that highlight women's achievements and ongoing struggles through various artistic expressions.
catalogs.summary: The 'Budding Artists 2023-2024' exhibition, organized by applied art professor Yasmina Driouch at Lycée technique de Settat, commemorates International Women's Day. It features first-year students' personalized portraits of famous women with Moroccan influences, and second-year students' realistic reproductions of renowned artworks on women's themes. Featured pieces include depictions of Selena Gomez, Marilyn Monroe, Coco Chanel, and Hajja Hamdaouia, plus a reimagined 'Girl with a Pearl Earring.'

catalogs.title: DESIGNATHON 2025-2026 Lost Tech Brand Guidelines
catalogs.description: Explore the DESIGNATHON 2025-2026 Lost Tech brand guidelines, featuring minimalist geometric typography, glitch-inspired design, official color palette, logo usage, and graphic elements.
catalogs.summary: This document outlines the brand guidelines for DESIGNATHON 2025-2026 Lost Tech. It details the visual identity, featuring minimalist geometric typography, glitch-inspired design, and a digital archive aesthetic. Key elements covered include logo usage, the official color palette (Deep Blue, Orange, Beige), typography (Nexa), graphic elements, social media icons, stationery, and photography style.
